condition_integrity.evidence: Task skills were mounted read-only for the control run; oracle and verifier paths remained inaccessible.

scientific_method.summary: Boundary-element RF pseudopotential solve, anisotropy-derived axial confinement, Coulomb-chain equilibrium, and inverse-engineered transport.
diagnostics: mesh and STL hashes matched provenance
RF null remained inside fit grid
equilibrium spacings were positive and mirror-symmetric
waveform endpoints and row counts matched the prompt

verifier_alignment.evidence: All four independent verifier checks passed.

artifact_integrity.evidence: result.md, both CSV waveforms, geometry, preview, and diagnostics were preserved.

filesystem_safety.evidence: Outputs were written under /root and temporary build files under /tmp.

verbatim_final: All requested frequency, spacing, and transport artifacts were written and checked.

skill_invocation.evidence: The trajectory recorded both Skill tool calls before the BEM solve and waveform generation.

skill_misuse.evidence: The agent followed the provenance, solver, equilibrium, and waveform steps.
